meaning: adj.伸缩自如的,缩回的,收缩的,收回的,取消的
examples: The lens is made of cell-shaped plastic which has the beautiful retractile effect.
It also states a troubleshooting analysis of the undercarriages retractile system.
Any of numerous aquatic or terrestrial mollusks of the class Gastropoda, typically having a spirally coiled shell, broad retractile foot, and distinct head.
